title: Australian Almond Crusted Gratin
description: A unique twist on the classic gratin, with a crunchy almond crust. This dish is perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together the almonds, melted butter, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
In a separate bowl, mix together the potatoes, grated cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes.
Sprinkle a layer of the almond mixture over the potatoes.
Repeat this process until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of potatoes on top.
Pour the warmed chicken broth over the top layer of potatoes.
Dot the top with sour cream, if using.
Cover the dish with foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
